reasoning: The YFinance API statistical tool estimates a 43% probability of the stock exceeding the current threshold on December 14, largely driven by a recent negative short-term trend (slope = -0.11 per day) and a 0/1 historical seasonal rate. Following the instructions, this 0.43 probability is used as the primary anchor for the first resolution date. For longer forecast horizons, weekly/monthly noise and base-rate market drift regress the probabilities toward and slightly above baseline expectation. Thus, uncertainty is modelled to increase over time, moving the estimate for Jan 6 to 0.47 and for Mar 7 to 0.49.
